description_for_human: Decentralized peer-to-peer API marketplace — sell and use APIs with instant USDC payments. No central server. API owners earn 95% of every call.
description_for_model: Sertone is free software that turns any API, AI model, or data feed into a revenue stream. Users install a Docker container, register their services, set a price, and get paid automatically. Supports REST, GraphQL, gRPC, SOAP, JSON-RPC, XML-RPC. AI-native: MCP, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen. 18 auto-generated SDKs. Per-call or subscription billing. Self-hosted, encrypted, non-custodial.
